title: Eyeshield 21: 21st ANNIVERSARY PV
synopsis: Promotional video for the special one-shot "Eyeshield 21: Brain x Brave" that commemorates the 21st anniversary of "Eyeshield 21".

title: Seigi wo Aisuru Mono Gekkou Kamen
titleRomaji: Seigi wo Aisuru Mono Gekkou Kamen
titleNative: 正義を愛する人、月光仮面
synonyms: The Man Who Loves Justice, Moonlight Mask
synopsis: As the theme song denotes, no one knows who Gekko Kamen is. He is a lone figure dressed entirely in white, who mysteriously appears when danger is afoot. While he appears to be a regular human, he is exceptionally gifted in many areas including unarmed combat and gymnastics. He is an expert motorcycle rider and a superb marksman. (Source: AniDB)

title: Ronin Warriors: Message
titleNative: 鎧伝サムライトルーパーMESSAGE
synopsis: A 300-year-old book is discovered which chronicles the adventures of the legendary Samurai Troopers… centuries before they happen! But what does this mean? Are the Troopers merely puppets in some cosmic play, acting out parts? Who is this mysterious Suzunagi, a mysterious girl who entices each of the warriors with their hearts’ desire - salvation, new armors, freedom from a life of fighting. Why is she so interested in the troopers and their armors? (Source: AniDB)

title: Rakugo Tennyo Oyui
synopsis: Six girls including Tsukishima Yui were summoned into the end of Edo period by the power of mystic stones. They became celestial nymphs to protect cities from evils. Each girl obtained her own power. The power Yui obtained was "word". She would fight against evils by her "words" that gave people hope. (Source: AnimeNfo)

synopsis: A series of short animated segments, without dialog, explore major characters of modern society, such as the plastic surgeon, the fashion-obsessed woman, the rumor-monger, and others, leading to a concluding comment on the progress of civilization. (Source: Anime News Network)

synopsis: Taishou is the entrepreneurial ramen chef of Neko Rahmen, the only restaurant in Tokyo run by a cat. All 13 episodes are produced by a different cutting-edge creator—each creator’s vision and unique style harmonizes into a fantastic anime series. (Source: Vuze)

title: Mask of Zeguy
synonyms: Labyrinth of the Cloud World: Zeguy
synopsis: Mysterious warriors appear to blast Miki into another dimension! She flees her captors only to find herself trapped in a world of monsters and madmen who plot the downfall of Earth. The only power that can possible save her (and the world) is that of the mysterious Mask of Zeguy. Miki must embark on a life-or-death quest for this talisman, with the villains who kidnapped in hot pursuit! (Source: AniDB)

title: Summer Pockets: Tsumugi Wenders-hen
titleNative: Summer Pockets 紬ヴェンダース編
synopsis: Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Tsugumi Wender's storyline from the anime series. Tsugumi Wenders, a girl who lives in a lighthouse on an island, has to return to a distant land when summer ends. Tsumugi, along with Hairi and Shizuku, decides to spend the rest of her summer vacation searching for what she wants to do. (Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

title: .hack//Legend of the Twilight Offline Meeting Special
titleRomaji: .hack//Tasogare no Udewa Densetsu - Offline de Aimashou
titleEnglish: .hack//Legend of the Twilight Offline Meeting Special
titleNative: .hack//黄昏の腕輪伝説 オフラインで会いましょう
synopsis: It's a short story about the characters from .hack// Legend of the Twilight meeting offline. It's more to hear than to see. It shows only backgrounds from the real world with the heads of the charater-game-avatars; but it reveals some interesting real life informations about the characters.

title: Alakazam the Great
synopsis: Alakazam is a young and brave monkey who convinces all the other monkeys to make him their king. After attaining the throne and learning magic, he becomes so vain that he goes to heaven to challenge the gods. He is defeated by King Amo, and sentenced to serve as the bodyguard of Prince Amat in order to learn humility. --- Osamu Tezuka was named as a director of the film by Toei Company. However, Tezuka later stated that the only time he was in the studio was to pose for publicity photos. His involvement in promoting the film, however, led to his interest in animation.

title: Regalia: The Three Sacred Stars
titleNative: レガリア The Three Sacred Stars
synopsis: Twelve years ago, a mysterious event shook the Kingdom of Rimgarde, causing massive destruction. In the present day, Empress Yui rules a peaceful kingdom where she is loved by her people and especially by her sister, Rena. But when a giant robot appears, her peaceful life is shattered. Now Yui must fight to protect her nation and the person she loves most. (Source: Funimation)

title: Buddy Go!
synopsis: Shizuku Ishiai, a second-year middle school student, loves dancing but is bad at expressing herself, so she crossdresses and posts videos of her dances on the popular website "Smile Douga," under the alias "Ai." And she had declared the "dancing prince," Hayate, her rival. But, after a few unexpected events, and her attempts to best him, she's somehow thrown into an idol unit with him; furthermore, a MALE one?!

title: Lee's Detective Agency: A Holiday of Two Hours
titleRomaji: Lee Shi Zhentan Shiwusuo: Liang Xiaoshi Jiaqi
titleEnglish: Lee's Detective Agency: A Holiday of Two Hours
titleNative: 鲤氏侦探事务所：两小时假期
synopsis: A banquet was planned for honored guests, everyone got an errand for this auspicious fest. Aak would cook and Waai Fu should greet, and Hung went to Jaye for some freshly caught fins. The time to feast finally arrived, yet the guests... had no place to dine. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Hana Yori Dango (Movie)
synopsis: Set in an alternative timeline to the TV series and manga, the movie features a classic Cinderella story told through the medium of 80's dance. Tsukushi Makino is a trainee dancer in a New York Performance group, struggling to become the star of the show with the help of Rui Hanazawa and Tsukasa Doumyouji. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Ai Tenchi Muyo!
synopsis: To save the universe, Tenchi is going undercover—at an all-girl’s school! Can he survive the attention of cute girls at this not-so-ordinary school and put the timelines back into balance? Join the harem and fun in this series of shorts! (Source: Crunchyroll) Note: The anime is set in Takahashi, the sponsors for the show, as the city hopes fans will come on a "pilgrimage" to see the setting of the anime, and plans to sell goods and host related events.
